items.title: Americans react to Supreme Court upholding birthright citizenship
items.dek: The BBC asked Americans how they felt after the Supreme Court's ruling on citizenship for babies born in the US.
items.body: The BBC asked Americans how they felt after the Supreme Court's ruling on citizenship for babies born in the US.

items.title: 'Absolute madness': Row over plan to demolish Nazi bunker under Berlin
items.dek: City officials want to build flats on the city centre site but others say it should be preserved as part of Germany's history.
items.body: City officials want to build flats on the city centre site but others say it should be preserved as part of Germany's history.
